grant_title: New coastal-protection grants for disadvantaged communities
project_area: Coastal erosion protection, flood risk reduction, shoreline strengthening, environmental justice, disaster preparedness
demographic_requirements: Disadvantaged communities and environmental justice areas
eligibility_summary: Grants are available to local communities, community-based organizations, and first responders in Long Island, New York, focusing on coastal erosion protection, flood risk reduction, shoreline strengthening, environmental justice, and disaster preparedness. Priority is given to disadvantaged communities.
